title: Metal Money Tin Savings Bank Money Bank, Money box Father's Day, Christmas or Birthday- Bad Dad Instant Fines
features: This Father's Day Money Tin Savings Bank is the perfect gift for any dad who loves to save up his spare change.
With a sleek monochrome printed design that reads "Bad Dad Instant Fines", this money tin adds a touch of humor to the act of saving money
Measuring at 15cm x 10cm, this money tin is compact yet spacious enough to hold up to approximately £100 worth of coins, making it a practical and fun way to stash away loose change.
Please keep in mind that a tin opener is required to access the contents of the tin, ensuring that the saved coins stay secure until it's time to cash them in.
Whether it's for Father's Day, a birthday, or Christmas, this money tin is an ideal gift for special occasions that will surely bring a smile to any dad's face.
